_comment: IRS var_name (from potential_targets_preliminary.csv) to PUF code and TMD variable name mapping. For gain/loss variables, tmd_name_gt0/lt0 give the soi.csv names for positive/negative splits. Updated 2026-03-04.

agi.notes: Adjusted Gross Income (AGI). E00100 (raw input) validates against pufsums. TC uses C00100. The var_type='count' rows for agi provide total return counts (soi.csv 'count' variable).

busprofincome.notes: Business/profession net profit/loss. IRS has gt0 and lt0 separately. IRS gt0-lt0 = soi2015 exactly.

cgtaxable.notes: Net capital gain/loss in AGI. IRS has gt0 and lt0 separately. IRS gt0-lt0 = soi2015 within $1,000. TC uses C01000.

cgdist.notes: Capital gain distributions reported on Form 1040

iradist.notes: IRA distributions. IRS 2015 = E01400 soi2015 exactly.

pensions_taxable.notes: Taxable pensions and annuities (included in AGI)

socsectaxable.notes: Taxable Social Security benefits. TC uses C02500.

taxbc.notes: Income tax before credits. TC uses C05800.

tottax.notes: Total income tax (SOI definition). IRS 2015 = E06500 soi2015 exactly. TC equivalent: C09200 - REFUND. Note: soi.csv passes this through as 'tottax' (not renamed by soi_targets.py).

taxac.notes: Income tax after credits (SOI definition). puf_to_soi uses E08800. TC equivalent: IITAX.

partnerscorpincome.notes: Combined partnership and S corp net income/loss. IRS gt0-lt0 = E26270 soi2015 exactly. Part of Schedule E. Note: soi_targets.py aggregates partnerincome+scorpincome into this variable for 2021.

partnerincome.notes: Partnership income only (2021/2022 only, not in 2015). Subset of E26270. soi_targets.py combines partnerincome+scorpincome into partnership_and_s_corp_income/losses.

scorpincome.notes: S corporation income only (2021/2022 only, not in 2015). Subset of E26270. In soi_targets.py, scorpincome values are added to partnership_and_s_corp_income/losses.

rentroyalty.notes: Rent/royalty income/loss. Separate PUF codes for income (E25850) and loss (E25860). E25850 has 10x documentation error. IRS values don't match PUF codes exactly (definitional differences). Needs manual review for targeting strategy.

estateincome.notes: Estate/trust income/loss. Separate PUF codes. IRS net = PUF net exactly, but individual gt0/lt0 differ symmetrically ($1.44B).

exemption.notes: Personal exemption amount. No direct E-code in pufsums. pe_to_soi uses pe('exemptions'). Eliminated after TCJA (2018+). Only relevant for 2015.

exemptions_n.notes: Number of exemptions claimed. XTOT in PUF. Not in pufsums.csv so cannot validate against soi2015. var_type='number' in potential_targets.

amt.notes: Alternative minimum tax. TC computed variable C09600. No E-code in PUF. IRS 2015 = $31.2B.

qbid.notes: Qualified business income deduction (Section 199A). TC variable QBIDED. Only available 2018+ (post-TCJA). potential_targets has 2021/2022 only.

itemded.notes: Total itemized deductions. TC computed variable C21060. No E-code in PUF. pe_to_soi uses pe('itemized_taxable_income_deductions').

sd.notes: Standard deduction amount. TC computed variable C04200. No E-code in PUF.

id_salt.notes: State and local income/sales tax deduction (Schedule A). E18400 = id_pit + id_gst. Has 10x documentation error in pufsums. IRS 2015 vs E18400 adj: essentially exact.

id_retax.notes: Real estate tax deduction (Schedule A). Has 10x documentation error in pufsums. IRS 2015 vs E18500 adj: essentially exact.

id_intpaid.notes: Total interest paid deduction (Schedule A). Includes mortgage + investment interest. Has 10x documentation error. IRS 2015 vs E19200 adj: essentially exact.

id_contributions.notes: Charitable contributions deduction (Schedule A). Has 10x documentation error. IRS 2015 vs E19700 adj: essentially exact.

id_medical_uncapped.notes: Medical/dental expenses before AGI floor (Schedule A). Has 10x documentation error. IRS 2015 vs E17500 adj: essentially exact.

id_medical_capped.notes: Medical/dental expenses after AGI floor. TC computed variable C17000. No E-code for capped amount.

id_mortgage.notes: Mortgage interest deduction. SUBSET of E19200 (total interest paid). IRS 2015 = $283.0B vs E19200 = $304.5B. No separate PUF code; PUF combines mortgage + investment interest in E19200.

id_pit.notes: State/local personal income tax deduction. SUBSET of E18400. IRS 2015 id_pit ($335.1B) + id_gst ($17.6B) = id_salt ($352.7B) = E18400. No separate PUF code.

id_gst.notes: General sales tax deduction. SUBSET of E18400. Filers choose either income tax (id_pit) OR sales tax (id_gst) on Schedule A. No separate PUF code.

id_taxpaid.notes: Total taxes paid deduction (Schedule A). IRS 2015 = $553.0B > E18400+E18500 ($541.3B) by $11.7B (includes personal property taxes etc). TC uses C18300.

id_pitgst.notes: State income and sales tax combined. Only in potential_targets for 2021/2022. Also unmapped (passes through) in old soi_targets.py pipeline.

id.notes: Count of itemized deduction filers. Only var_type='count' rows in potential_targets. Not a targeted variable in soi.csv.
